title: chaenorhinum litorale subsp. pterosporum
intro: Chaenorhinum litorale subsp. pterosporum is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, also known as a type of snapdragon, which is native to the Iberian Peninsula and Western Europe. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chaenorhinum litorale subsp. pterosporum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Chaenorhinum litorale subsp. pterosporum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
